display_text: Treant Protector Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances Overgrowth with a powerful buff that counters Anti-Initiator setups and mechanics. This transforms Treant Protector into a tanky, high-impact initiator, ensuring map control and sustained teamfight presence by phasing through enemies and dealing splash damage.
search_text: Treant Protector Aghanim Scepter anti-initiator map control teamfight splash damage phased movement tanky initiator

display_text: Treant Protector Aghanim's Shard: Grants Eyes In The Forest, countering Ward Control and Vision Denial mechanics. This enables Treant Protector to dominate map vision, ensuring safe objective control and providing critical information for team movements.
search_text: Treant Protector Aghanim Shard ward control vision denial map vision safe objectives unobstructed vision Eyes In The Forest
